examples: He may have been a member of the Judean court.
The Dead Sea Scrolls were found in caves in the Judean desert.
He built towns in the Judean hills and forts and towers in the wooded areas.
Maccabee was a Judean priest who commanded the resistance to Greek forces around 165 B.
The life of a first century Judean carpenter, let alone messiah, is hard to compare to that lived by western teenagers today.
